item.title: Working at Planet Fitness as a Front Desk Associate: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: Everything you need to know about working at Planet Fitness front desk, including pay, daily tasks, and honest employee reviews.

item.title: Working at LA Fitness as a Front Desk Associate: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: A complete guide to working at LA Fitness front desk, including real employee reviews on pay, daily tasks, management, and career prospects.
